# Copilot Instructions — Coffee Machine 3.0

This is a specification repo for Coffee Machine 3.0. We do not write or generate code here — that's the platform teams' job.

## Source of truth

- `specs/coffee-machine-3.0-brief.md` — product brief; authoritative for scope and out-of-scope.
- `specs/personas/` — the people we're building for. When you reference a persona, use one from this folder by name. Do not invent new ones.
- `specs/glossary.md` — domain vocabulary. Use these terms verbatim. Do not introduce synonyms.

If the brief, personas, or glossary doesn't cover something the user asks about, surface the gap. Don't invent a position.

## Scope discipline

Items listed as out-of-scope in the brief stay out — including as "stretch goals" or "future considerations."

## JIRA configuration

> TODO (filled in during Challenge 0). Without this, every JIRA call is a guessing game — and your tickets will collide with the other teams sharing this project.

- Instance:
- Project key:
- Team identifier:        # e.g. T1, T2 — assigned by your facilitator
- Issue title prefix:     # always start titles with [T1] (substitute your team ID)
- Default issue type: Task
- Required labels:        # must include team-T1
- Default assignee: unassigned
- Board / sprint: backlog
